mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vacation (id, user_id, start_date, end_date, type, reason, created_at) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, start_date, end_date, type, reason, created_at FROM vacation WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
